message:
refactor: extract buildKeptPageIndices helper — deduplicate page pruning loop

The 8-line page skip loop (maxPages + canSkipPageMultiCol + keptPageIndices
accumulation) was duplicated verbatim across 4 call sites in fragment-do,
query-do (×2), and local-executor. Extracted to shared buildKeptPageIndices()
in operators.ts. Returns { kept: number[], skipped: number }.
